entity.summary: Australian cryptocurrency order-book exchange and OTC desk founded in 2013, with its Singapore entity receiving a Major Payment Institution licence from the Monetary Authority of Singapore on October 1, 2021.
entity.notes: The 2013 launch remains a year-level marker because first-party materials establish the year but not an exact day. The Singapore licence belongs to Independent Reserve SG Pte. Ltd. and is recorded as a regional legal-entity milestone rather than as a blanket global licence.

expected.summary: Australia-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the Independent Reserve brand.

changes.summary: Australian cryptocurrency order-book exchange and OTC desk founded in 2013, with its Singapore entity receiving a Major Payment Institution licence from the Monetary Authority of Singapore on October 1, 2021.
changes.notes: The 2013 launch remains a year-level marker because first-party materials establish the year but not an exact day. The Singapore licence belongs to Independent Reserve SG Pte. Ltd. and is recorded as a regional legal-entity milestone rather than as a blanket global licence.

events.title: Independent Reserve was founded in Australia in 2013
events.description: Independent Reserve was founded in 2013 as an Australian cryptocurrency order-book exchange and OTC trading desk.
events.notes: The official source establishes the year but not an exact day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: Independent Reserve SG received a MAS Major Payment Institution licence
events.description: Independent Reserve announced that its Singapore operation received approval for a Major Payment Institution licence from MAS under the Payment Services Act to provide Digital Payment Token services.
events.notes: This event applies to Independent Reserve SG Pte. Ltd. and its regulated Singapore services.

evidence.title: Independent Reserve About Us
evidence.notes: The official company page identifies the three founders and the 2013 founding year.

evidence.title: Independent Reserve gains licensure approval from MAS
evidence.notes: The official announcement states that full Major Payment Institution licence approval was received on October 1, 2021.

evidence.title: MAS Financial Institutions Directory: Independent Reserve SG Pte. Ltd.
evidence.notes: The MAS directory verifies the current Major Payment Institution status and Digital Payment Token service permission for Independent Reserve SG Pte. Ltd.
